steps.t: Gollum might be found at one of several locations suggested by Miluimil. Miluimil has asked you to search for any signs of Gollum in the Scuttledells.…
Gollum might be found at one of several locations suggested by Miluimil. Miluimil has asked you to search for any signs of Gollum in the Scuttledells.…
Miluimil is at Ivorel's camp in the Scuttledells. You should return to Miluimil and tell him what you have learned of Gollum's whereabouts.
